data.title: Braze Stock Jumps Over 23% In Pre-Market Session—Here's Why
data.description: Braze Inc. (NASDAQ: BRZE) saw a 23.36% surge to $22.23 in pre-market trading following the release of its fiscal Q4 2026 results. The cloud-based customer engagement platform's stock closed the previous session down 4.76% at $18.02. In Q4 FY2026, Braze reported $205.2 million in revenue, marking a significant increase from $160.4 million in Q4 FY2025. Non-GAAP Operating Income also rose to $14.5 million from $7.9 million. The company's total customer count grew to 2,609 from 2,296, while free cash flow decreased to $13.9 million from $15.2 million. Braze experienced a 27.9% revenue growth in the fourth quarter, with customers generating annual recurring revenue of $500,000 or more growing to 333 from 247. Quarterly bookings also rose by over 50% compared to the previous year. CEO Bill Magnuson noted, "The world’s largest and most sophisticated brands are choosing Braze as a foundational partner." Full-year FY2026 revenue details and further insights can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Autonomous Driving Software Market to Reach USD 4.4 Billion by 2032, Driven by Rising Integration of AI-Powered Mobility Solutions, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent market research study by MarkNtel Advisors revealed that the Global Autonomous Driving Software Market is estimated to experience a robust growth, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 11.9% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to various factors, including the rising demand for autonomous driving technology.

data.title: BC.Game Appoints Industry Veteran Kar Kheng Giam as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Belize City, Belize, March 25, 2026 - BC.Game, a well-known crypto gaming platform established in 2017, has enhanced its leadership team by appointing Kar Kheng Giam, commonly referred to as "KK," as the new Chief Executive Officer. This development comes as the platform ramps up its expansion efforts in regulated markets. With a solid track record in the industry, BC.Game aims to capitalize on KK's expertise to drive growth and further solidify its position. The company's strategic move aligns with its objective to capitalize on the burgeoning crypto gaming sector.

data.title: Physicians Committee and Wilberforce Institute Urge NIH and RFK Jr. to Cancel Country's Oldest Taxpayer-Funded Dog Experiments
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, on March 25, 2026, it was reported that funding for the nation's longest-standing taxpayer-funded canine experiments is due to end this month. Two non-profit organizations are advocating for the National Institutes of Health to reconsider continuing funding for these experiments. The Wilberforce Institute is among the groups opposing further funding for the experiments.

data.title: Ripple partners with Singapore sandbox to trial RLUSD in trade finance, joining BLOOM initiative with Unloq to test XRPL for cross-border settlement.
data.description: Ripple has recently partnered with the Monetary Authority of Singapore’s BLOOM initiative, alongside Unloq, to conduct trials involving RLUSD and XRPL for programmable cross-border trade settlement within Singapore. This collaboration aims to explore the potential of these technologies for enabling efficient and secure cross-border transactions. Ripple's participation in this initiative highlights their commitment to innovating in the fintech sector. This partnership could pave the way for new advancements in cross-border trade settlement processes, benefiting businesses and consumers alike. The trials are expected to provide valuable insights into the capabilities of RLUSD and XRPL in facilitating seamless and cost-effective trade settlement.

data.title: Data Accessibility Failures Leave Equipment Idle 50% of the Time, New Teletrac Navman Report Finds
data.description: In Milton Keynes, England, recent research by Teletrac Navman revealed that 74% of operators consider data accessibility as the primary obstacle hindering the enhancement of equipment utilization. This then leads to assets sitting idle for 50% of the time. The study titled ‘Mobilizing the Future of Fleets: 2026 Equipment Utilisation Edition’ identified a significant disparity between digital investment and digital advancement. It was found that 87% of fleets have embraced digital technologies, yet there is a noticeable lag in achieving digital maturity.

data.title: TIXR APPOINTS WAYNE GRIERSON AS MANAGING DIRECTOR, UK AND EMEA AS COMPANY ACCELERATES INTERNATIONAL EXPANSION
data.description: Wayne Grierson, who previously served as the CEO of Motorsport Events and the COO of StubHub International, has been chosen to spearhead the expansion efforts of Tixr into new geographical territories. Tixr, a prominent global technology company focused on revolutionizing ticketing and live event commerce, announced this significant development in London on March 25, 2026. Grierson will play a crucial role in leading the cross-border expansion of Tixr in the realms of music, sports, and live entertainment industries, bringing his extensive expertise to drive growth in these sectors.
